description: Team confirmed P&L display is back in scope for V1 after discussion with stakeholders.
source_text: Confirmed with stakeholders — P&L display is back in scope for V1 launch.

description: New feature request: dark mode toggle across the entire application.
source_text: We should add dark mode support. Marking as fast follower for next release.

description: Discussion about chart switching — team says it should stay in V1 contrary to PRD comment.
source_text: Chart switching should stay in V1. We have capacity after the auth work was simplified.
